summary: Tested MessagesPage with new Gaming/Gamer design. All 9 features tested and working: login, messages page loads with new design, conversation list with card design, clicking conversation opens chat, ChatBackground with animations, message bubbles with new design (green for mine, gray for others), sending messages works, search button opens modal, search and start conversation works.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before established - may be expected behavior in test environment

login: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
Redirects to dashboard after successful login
messages_page_design: Messages page loads at /messages with new Gaming design
Header shows 'الرسائل' with Sparkles icon (lime-400 color)
UserPlus button visible for searching users
conversation_list: 4-5 conversations displayed with new card design
Avatar with gradient border (lime-400 to emerald-500)
Conversation cards show user name, last message, timestamp
Last message shows 'أنت:' prefix for own messages
chat_view: User avatar with gradient border in header
Empty state shows 'ابدأ المحادثة' and 'أرسل أول رسالة 👋'
message_bubbles: My messages displayed with lime/emerald gradient (green bubbles)
Other's messages displayed with slate-800 background (gray bubbles)
send_message: Send button with gradient (lime-500 to emerald-500)
Sending message works - message appears in chat
Message sent via WebSocket or HTTP fallback
search_modal: Search modal has ChatBackground with animations
Search input with placeholder 'ابحث عن مستخدم...'
Search results show avatar, name, username
'رسالة' button with gradient for each result

design_elements_verified.ChatBackground: Animated background with gradient from slate-950 via slate-900 to slate-950, animated blur elements (lime-500/5 and emerald-500/5)
design_elements_verified.MessageBubble: My messages: lime-500 to emerald-600 gradient with glow effect. Others: slate-800/80 with border
design_elements_verified.ConversationCard: Hover effects with lime-500/5 gradient, avatar with lime-400 to emerald-500 gradient border
design_elements_verified.Animations: Framer Motion animations for scale, opacity, position transitions

critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly from environment
WebSocket URL correctly derived from BACKEND_URL
All new design components (ChatBackground, MessageBubble, ConversationCard) implemented correctly
RTL layout properly handled with flex-row-reverse
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user account and conversations
context_for_next_testing_agent: MessagesPage redesigned with Gaming/Gamer theme fully tested. New design includes: ChatBackground with animated blur elements, MessageBubble with lime/emerald gradients for own messages and slate for others, ConversationCard with hover effects and gradient avatar borders. All messaging functionality (view conversations, open chat, send messages, search users, start new conversation) working correctly. WebSocket connection may show 'closed before established' warning but HTTP fallback works.
